evidence.snippet:
### Vista® Ultra
LONG RANGE
_Adaptive, powerful, the ultimate all-in-one lidar for ADAS and autonomous driving._

### Nova Ultra
NEAR RANGE
_Embeddable, scalable, the versatile fit-for-all lidar for smart vehicles, systems and spaces._
Cepton was built from the ground up to meet key lidar industry challenges for mass-market adoption

items.notes: Cepton makes LiDAR sensors (Vista® Ultra, Nova Ultra, Nova) for ADAS, autonomous vehicles, and smart infrastructure. Helius® perception solution bundles LiDAR with perception software. All core products are sensors/navigation devices.

products_categories.notes: All products are LiDAR sensors or related perception software. No secondary categories applicable.

value.address: 399 W. Trimble Rd., San Jose, CA, 95131

evidence.snippet:
399 W. Trimble Rd.,

_Award-winning, widely deployed near-range lidar, powered by Cepton's
OEM-validated Micro Motion Technology (MMT®)_

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Cepton sells OEM-validated LiDAR sensors that function as components for integration into various platforms. Blog content notes UAV applications (mapping, agriculture). Primary market is automotive ADAS, but sensors are suitable as drone navigation/sensing components.

items.name: Helius®
items.product_type: Smart LiDAR system with perception software

evidence.snippet:
Helius®
=======
_The Helius Smart Lidar System combines Cepton's state-of-the-art lidar technology with aperception software to provide intelligent, anonymized 3D perception._

StudioViz™
==========
A powerful virtual tool for data visualization, performance validation and solution customization, helping expedite lidar adoption from productization to deployment.

Patented, OEM-validated technology
Designed for seamless integration
Scalable for mass-market deployment

_Award-winning, widely deployed near-range lidar, powered by Cepton's
OEM-validated Micro Motion Technology (MMT®)_

readiness.notes: Products are OEM-validated, described as 'widely deployed,' and marketed for mass-market deployment at scale.

unresolved_questions: Cepton's primary market is automotive ADAS; drone-specific adoption is noted in blog content but no dedicated drone product page exists in corpus.
NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not disclosed.
Blue UAS listing not mentioned anywhere in corpus.

fetch_requests.reason: About-us page was skipped (skipped_class_budget). Would provide company mission, market focus, and potentially explicit drone/UAV references that could raise role confidence to high.
Vista Ultra dedicated product page not fetched; would confirm application verticals (including drone vs. automotive) to sharpen drone supply chain role classification.
fetch_requests.source_hint: linked from resource-0001 and resource-0002 navigation

tagline: Designs and manufactures solid-state lidar sensors (Nova, Nova Ultra, Vista Ultra) and edge-compute perception software (Helius) for autonomous vehicles and smart infrastructure. Production-ready systems leverage patented MMT and MagnoSteer technologies for near and long-range 3D sensing. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status not publicly confirmed; limited public evidence of U.S. defense or UAS program integration to date.
